$comment: Starter smart-home scenes for the run-home-scene skill. Each scene's device target states conform to the holo-tools smart_home_panel device.state schema (on, level 0-100, temperature_c, locked). Clone and adapt per home; device ids must match the user's actual devices.

scenes.name: Good Morning
scenes.description: Ease into the day: warm lights up, blinds open, comfortable temperature.

scenes.name: Movie Night
scenes.description: Cinema mood: lights low, blinds closed, cozy temperature.

scenes.name: I'm Leaving
scenes.description: Secure + save energy. Increase-security steps apply directly; never auto-unlocks.

scenes.name: Bedtime
scenes.description: Wind down: lights off, blinds closed, cooler room, doors locked.
